overview: Living Armor is a Normal-class Construct/Undead monster found in Ruins. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 200 HP, 22 physical damage, 120 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 3, MaxImpactEndurance 4. 8 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Guard Attack1 at 180% ratio (396 base damage). Nightmare gains 5 exclusive abilityies: Slash Attack Combo R, Slash Attack Combo L, Guard, Guard Attack1, Guard Attack2.

phases.name: Melee Combat
phases.description: 8 melee attacks. Slash Attack R (150%), Slash Attack L (150%), Slash Attack R Combo (150%), and more.

phases.name: Special Abilities
phases.description: 2 special abilities. Guard Attack1 (180%), Guard Attack2 (180%).

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

strategies.title: Elemental Weakness: Earth
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Earth (-4000). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Resists: Fire, Ice
strategies.description: Elemental resistances: Fire (+500), Ice (+500). Positive reduction values reduce incoming damage of that type.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 150
strategies.description: Has 150 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Nightmare Gains: Slash Attack Combo R, Slash Attack Combo L, Guard, Guard Attack1, Guard Attack2
strategies.description: Nightmare grade has 5 exclusive abilities not present in lower grades: Slash Attack Combo R, Slash Attack Combo L, Guard, Guard Attack1, Guard Attack2. These change the fight dynamics in Nightmare.

elite_differences: ActionSpeed 0 → 50 in Elite — attacks animate faster
ActionSpeed 0 → 100 in Nightmare — attacks animate faster
Nightmare gains 5 exclusive abilities: Slash Attack Combo R, Slash Attack Combo L, Guard, Guard Attack1, Guard Attack2

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
